recommendations.title: Some Guy Who Kills People
recommendations.overview: A former mental patient's repressed anger reaches the boiling point, leading him to embark on a mission of revenge against the thugs who once subjected him to severe physical and mental trauma.

recommendations.title: Code 3
recommendations.overview: A burned-out paramedic tries to survive his last 24 hours on the job while training a new recruit.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time... in Hollywood

recommendations.title: Buddy Games
recommendations.overview: After six lifelong friends have a five-year falling out, “The Bobfather”, reunites his pals for the Buddy Games, an insane competition of absurd physical and mental challenges with the chance to win a $150,000 pot. Now all bets are off, as the determ

recommendations.title: Dangerous Liaisons
recommendations.overview: The innocent Célène might be falling in love with popular surfer Tristan at her new school. But she has no idea that, in actuality, she’s the object of a cruel bet between Tristan and Instagram influencer Vanessa.

recommendations.title: A Perfect Getaway
recommendations.overview: For their honeymoon, newlyweds Cliff and Cydney head to the tropical islands of Hawaii. While journeying through the paradisaical countryside the couple encounters Kale and Cleo, two disgruntled hitchhikers and Nick and Gina, two wild but well-meanin

recommendations.title: Red Cliff II
recommendations.overview: The battle of Red Cliff continues and the alliance between Xu and East Wu is fracturing.  With Cao Cao's massive forces on their doorstep, will the kingdoms of Xu and East Wu survive?

recommendations.title: Churchill
recommendations.overview: A ticking-clock thriller following Winston Churchill in the 24 hours before D-Day.

recommendations.title: Surf Ninjas

recommendations.title: Let It Snow
recommendations.overview: Separated from her fiance after sneaking onto a restricted slope, Mia, a free riding snowboarder, must survive not only against nature, but the masked snowmobile rider in black who's out for her blood.
